svg.title: Synalux POS — training mode
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for training mode. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Let staff practice without real transactions, inventory, or charges -- DB: pos_config
When ON: purple banner appears on all register screens
Training sessions are completely isolated from production data
Manager can toggle without full settings access
Separate from manager PIN -- share with trainers only
Clears all training orders when session ends
Last reset: May 26, 2026 at end of session
Trainees use their normal PIN -- same RBAC applies
Cash drawer physically opens during training (same hw signal)
but no entry in pos_cash_movements for training sessions
(training_session_id IS NOT NULL filters from EOD)
Last session: May 26, 2026 -- 2h 14min -- Marcus, Jennifer, New Hire #3
LIVE PREVIEW -- REGISTER WITH TRAINING MODE ACTIVE
What staff see on the register terminal when training mode is ON
TRAINING MODE ACTIVE -- No real transactions. Stripe test mode. Excluded from reports.
All items tagged with purple T -- no inventory depleted.
TRAINING RECEIPT -- NOT A REAL TRANSACTION
Reports: WHERE training_session_id IS NOT NULL excluded
Inventory: Edge Fn skips depletion for training
EOD: training orders excluded from Z-report
Purge: DELETE WHERE training_session_id = X on end
